title: Baby Occult: Baby Tumbal Baby Die
original_title: Bayi Gaib: Bayi Tumbal Bayi Mati
overview: Farah's pregnancy was a joy for Rafa but disaster keeps happening as the baby grows. She knows her baby is the only way to save her family.
